specs.title: 1. Age step loads first at /checkup?step=age
2. Age → Body: Selecting age navigates to ?step=body
3. Body → Detailed: Selecting body part navigates to ?step=detailed
4. Detailed → Severity: Selecting symptom navigates to ?step=severity
5. Severity → Urgency: Setting severity navigates to ?step=urgency

specs.title: 8. Back from detailed: Returns to body step
9. Back from severity: Returns to detailed step
10. Back from urgency: Returns to severity step
11. Back from age: Returns to /start
12. Direct URL access: Navigating to /checkup?step=severity loads severity step
13. Invalid step: Unknown step shows error with restart option
14. Step persistence: Refreshing page keeps current step
15. Age selection persists: After selecting age, refresh shows selected age
16. Body part persists: Selected body part remains after refresh
17. Severity value persists: Temperature setting survives refresh
18. Full state restore: Complete assessment state restores on refresh
19. Restart from middle: Clicking restart clears state, goes to /start
20. Restart from results: Results page restart clears all assessment data

17. Severity value persists: Temperature setting survives refresh

20. Restart from results: Results page restart clears all assessment data
